description: Letter in which a Kohen, who is in financial difficulties and is the father of girls, asks the Nagid Mevorakh to allow him to beg throughout the Rif (countryside). He requests two letters of recommendation, one from the notable Abu'l-Mufaddal. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
